input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.9.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.9.1
            TITLE: if a vehicle breaks down or cannot restart, it will be removed from the course by track workers

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.9.1: If a vehicle breaks down or cannot restart, it will be removed from the course by track workers
D.12.9.1 If a vehicle breaks down or cannot restart, it will be removed from the course by track workers 
and scored DNF

final_answer: D.12.9.1 If a vehicle breaks down or cannot restart, it will be removed from the course by track workers and scored DNF
